mapper.sql: id, tournament_id, team_id, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tournament_team (tournament_id, team_id, status) VALUES (#{tournamentId}, #{teamId}, #{status})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tournament_team WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId} AND team_id = #{teamId}
mapper.select: SELECT rel_id AS relId, tournament_id AS tournamentId, tournament_name AS tournamentName, team_id AS teamId, team_name AS teamName, team_short_name AS teamShortName, team_logo AS teamLogo, sport_type AS sportType, sport_type_name AS sportTypeName, gender, gender_name AS genderName, status, status_name AS statusName, member_count AS memberCount, apply_time AS applyTime, audit_time AS auditTime FROM v_tournament_team_info WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId} ORDER BY apply_time DESC

SELECT t.id AS teamId, t.name AS teamName, t.logo AS teamLogo FROM tournament_team tt INNER JOIN team t ON tt.team_id = t.id WHERE tt.tournament_id = #{tournamentId} AND tt.status = 1 ORDER BY tt.create_time DESC
